name: seedance
description: Plan and produce short commercial videos with the generic Seedance workflow.

interface.longDescription: A generic commercial-video workflow for planning, generating, reviewing, and packaging short Seedance videos with rights, budget, retry, and delivery guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Use /seedance to plan a short commercial video.
Create PC and mobile Seedance prompt drafts.
Review a Seedance CM brief before generation.
